hooks.command: command -v graphify >/dev/null 2>&1 || { command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1 && uv tool install 'graphifyy==0.9.13' >/dev/null 2>&1; }; command -v graphify >/dev/null 2>&1 && graphify check-update . 2>/dev/null; exit 0
g=$(command -v graphify || echo "$HOME/.local/bin/graphify"); [ -x "$g" ] && exec "$g" hook-guard search; exit 0
g=$(command -v graphify || echo "$HOME/.local/bin/graphify"); [ -x "$g" ] && exec "$g" hook-guard read; exit 0
